reviews.comment:
cambiaron el sistema de atención pasar por la caja primero luego hacer el pedido hace que se forme colas sin ningún sentido sólo ahorro para el Con sección ario en reducción de Personal

(Translated by Google)
They changed the service system to require you to go to the checkout first and then place your order, which creates pointless queues and only saves money for the department through staff reductions.

reviews.comment:
Muy mala atención, pedí cambio para poder cargar agua caliente, no me dieron, y pedí q me vendan agua caliente del dispenser q tienen de agua fría/caliente y me dijeron q solo era para te jajaja

(Translated by Google)
Very bad service, I asked for change to be able to get hot water, they didn't give it to me, and I asked them to sell me hot water from the cold/hot water dispenser they have and they told me it was only for tea hahaha
